auth.errPassword: Password must be at least 8 characters
auth.confirmEmail: Check your email to confirm your account
auth.forgotBody: Tell us your email and we'll send you a link to set a new password.
auth.resetLinkSent: If that email has an account, a link is on its way. Check your inbox.
auth.resetSuccess: Your password is updated. Log in with your new key.
auth.errResetLink: This link is invalid or has expired. Ask for a new one.

settings.title: Settings
settings.intentAIHint: Only if you answered the questionnaire. Off, Aluna reads your chart without that context.
settings.memoryToggleHint: When on, Aluna remembers people, places, and projects from your conversations to accompany you better.
settings.memoriesHint: Memories Aluna distills from your conversations to accompany you better. Edit or delete them whenever you want.
settings.memoriesEmpty: Aluna doesn't keep any memories of you yet. They're born from your conversations.
settings.entitiesHint: The durable entities of Aluna's picture of you — people, pets, places, projects. Edit, pin, or delete them whenever you want.
settings.entitiesEmpty: Aluna doesn't recognize any entities of yours yet. They're born from your conversations.
settings.memoryDataHint: Download a copy of what Aluna remembers about you, or restore a file you downloaded before.
settings.memoryImportError: Couldn't import the file. Check that it's a JSON exported from Aluna.

essence.title: Your essence
essence.description: The portrait Aluna is forming of you from your conversations: who you are, your circle, your current themes. It forms on its own — here you can view it, edit it, or ask Aluna to form it again.
essence.empty: No portrait yet — it'll take shape as you talk with Aluna.
essence.needsKey: Needs an active AI key to form. Try again once one's connected.
essence.memoryOff: Memory is off right now, so there's nothing to regenerate from. Turn it back on and Aluna will pick up where it left off.
essence.clearConfirm: Clear your portrait? Aluna will form it again from scratch on your next conversation.

settings.deckLatentNote: You'll be able to build your deck once storage is connected.
settings.deckCardError: We couldn't update that card. Try again.
settings.deckBackError: We couldn't save the card back. Try again.

legal.draftNote: Draft under review — this document may change before launch.

admin.title: Control center
admin.navOrderHint: This is the order in which EVERY account sees the 6 windows, in the nav and in Today. Use ↑/↓ and save when it looks right.
admin.navOrderReadonlyHint: This is the current order of the 6 windows. Only the superadmin can change it.
admin.collabEmpty: No collaborators or other superadmins yet.
admin.migrationPending: A database migration is pending in Supabase.
admin.colabWelcomeBody: From here you'll moderate shared content and support other accounts, once those tools are ready.
admin.referralNote: The discount applies at checkout once Dodo is connected; you pay the collaborator yourself and mark it here.
admin.referralConfirmMarkPaid: Mark the pending commission for code {code} as paid?
admin.myReferralEmpty: You don't have a code yet — ask the administrator for one.

hoy.weatherSub: Today's sky over you — your soul's weather.
hoy.dayNumberAria: Your personal day is {n}. Open Numbers.
hoy.askHint: Your chart, your numbers and today's sky — in the answer.
hoy.askPlaceholder: Why is it hard to decide today?
hoy.askSug1: How do I make the most of today's sky?
hoy.askSug2: What does my personal day ask of me?

lensSub.horoscopo: Your sign, today and this week

proactive.title: Aluna's holding these for you
proactive.manifestationHarvest: Your manifestation “{intention}” comes to harvest on {date}.

onboarding.timeHint: The time sharpens your chart; you can leave it for later.
onboarding.genderEyebrow: So we speak to you well
onboarding.genderHint: Sets the grammatical gender your readings use.
onboarding.intentGoalsHint: Choose what resonates. You can change course anytime.
onboarding.intentAffirmSelf: You'll look at yourself with honesty and tenderness (svadhyaya).
onboarding.intentAffirmBonds: You'll understand your bonds from the soul, not from fear.
onboarding.intentAffirmPurpose: You'll listen to your dharma: what you came here to do.
onboarding.intentAffirmFuture: You'll walk toward what's coming with open eyes.
onboarding.intentAffirmSpirituality: You'll explore the sacred at your own pace.
onboarding.intentAffirmOthers: You'll see others with more compassion and clarity.
onboarding.intentAffirmDecisions: You'll decide from your center, not from the noise.
onboarding.intentFocusTitle: Where do you want more light now?
onboarding.intentFocusHint: Your energy panel will put these areas first.
onboarding.cuspHint: Your chart will tell the exact boundary

profile.title: Profiles
profile.photoBadType: Invalid format (use PNG, JPG or WEBP)
profile.photoError: We couldn't upload the photo. Please try again.
profile.peopleSub: The skies of your loved ones, kept beside yours.

lifetime.title: Life Path
lifetime.error: We couldn't trace your life path. Please try again.
lifetime.empty: There are no milestones to show on your path yet.
lifetime.chatDormantBody: The chat with Aluna lights up when you connect her AI voice. Meanwhile, your path already speaks for itself.

manifest.title: Manifestations
manifest.subtitle: Sown at the new moon, harvested at the full.
manifest.emptyHint: Pick a lunar horizon and write what you want to grow.
manifest.error: We couldn't bring in your manifestations. Try again.
manifest.formError: We couldn't sow your intention. Try again.
manifest.deleteError: We couldn't release this intention. Try again.
manifest.intentionPlaceholder: What do you want to grow?

journal.title: Journal
journal.error: We couldn't open your notebook. Try again.
journal.emptyHint: Write down whatever you want to remember from tonight.
journal.formError: We couldn't save your note. Try again.
journal.deleteError: We couldn't delete this note. Try again.

numerology.title: Numerology
numerology.subtitle: Your numeric map
numerology.tapHint: Tap a number to see how it's calculated
numerology.proseSoon: The full evolutionary reading of this number is coming soon.

reading.tierEssenceHint: The essence, in a few lines.
reading.tierDeepHint: A deeper reading, with body and nuance.
reading.tierCompleteHint: No limit: everything Aluna sees in you.
reading.gated: The longer readings awaken when Aluna finds her inner voice. For now, her essence already speaks to you:
reading.error: Something clouded the reading. Try again in a moment. Meanwhile, her essence:

numerology.interpHint: Tap your life path or any lens to read its meaning.

carta.title: Birth Chart
carta.subtitle: Your birth sky
carta.coreHint: Tap a planet on the wheel and I'll tell you its story: its gift, its shadow, and the house where it lives.
carta.solarNotice: No birth time: solar chart. Houses and Ascendant are approximate.
carta.tapHint: Tap a planet to see its detail
carta.errorChart: Couldn't chart it. Please try again.
carta.kindTransitsHint: Today's sky over you — your soul's weather.
carta.kindSolarReturnHint: Your chart for the year, from your last birthday.
carta.kindProgressedHint: Your advanced chart: how your sky matures over the years.
carta.interpHint: Tap any planet, aspect, or house on the left to read what it means in your chart.

chat.title: Ask Aluna
chat.greeting: Ask me anything about your chart, your numbers, or your path. I answer from your sky.
chat.dormantBody: The chat with Aluna lights up when you connect her AI voice. Meanwhile, your chart and numbers already speak to you in their sections.
chat.lensFocusHint: The guidance focuses only on what you leave on.
chat.tarotChooseTitle: How would you like your card?

synastry.title: Compatibility
synastry.subtitle: The sky between two people
synastry.error: Couldn't read the bond. Please try again.
synastry.overallHigh: There's a current between you: the energy flows with ease.
synastry.overallMixed: A bond of light and nuance, with fertile ground to grow.
synastry.overallLow: A meeting that asks for conscious work: friction unites too.
synastry.framing: Synastry doesn't say whether you fit, but where you mirror each other. Every relationship is a mirror: what flows nourishes, what rubs teaches. Read it as a map of the ground you share, not a verdict.
synastry.themeAttractionHint: The chemistry: Sun, Moon, Venus and Mars crossing.
synastry.themeCommunicationHint: How mind and word understand each other (Mercury, Moon).
synastry.themeHarmonyHint: The easy flow between your lights and gentle planets.
synastry.themeGrowthHint: Fertile friction: tensions and Saturn that ask you to mature together.
synastry.noDrivers: No marked contacts in this theme.
synastry.emptyBody: Compatibility needs two charts. Create someone else's profile and come back here to see the sky between you.

pilares.title: Four Pillars
pilares.subtitle: Ba Zi · Saju — your Eastern map
pilares.noTime: No birth time: the hour pillar is hidden.
pilares.error: Couldn't calculate the pillars. Please try again.
pilares.modeProHint: Ten Gods and hidden stems relative to your Day Master.
pilares.strengthMethod: Method: month command + weighted roots and support
pilares.balancedNote: Your Day Master is balanced: no element family dominates; watch the nuance of each decade.
pilares.luckStart: First pillar at {years} years and {months} months
pilares.luckNeutralNote: Tradition derives the direction from birth sex; we show you both.
pilares.luckNoTimeNote: Without an exact time, the starting age has ±2 months of imprecision.
pilares.annualJanFebNote: If you were born in January–February, the year pillar changes at Lichun (~Feb 4), not January 1.
pilares.interactionsEmpty: No major interactions between your pillars: a serene map.
pilares.threePillarsNote: Without a birth time the calculation uses 3 pillars; the hour pillar and its stars are omitted.
pilares.interpHint: Tap a pillar, an element, or any symbol on the left to read what it means in your chart.

horoscopo.title: Horoscope
horoscopo.subtitle: The sky of the period, read for your sign
horoscopo.subtitleEastern: The sky of the period, read for your animal
horoscopo.proMethod: Whole-sign solar houses from {sign}. Sign-to-sign aspects. Period sampled at local noon. Time zone: {tz}.
horoscopo.error: The sky did not answer. Try again.
horoscopo.noEvents: No major events this period: a steady background sky.
horoscopo.wuXingSame: {period} of the period and {animal} of your animal: the same element, energy that recognizes and reinforces itself.
horoscopo.wuXingGenerates: {period} of the period nourishes (生) {animal}, your animal's element: wind at your back.
horoscopo.wuXingControls: {period} of the period controls (克) {animal}, your animal's element: pace yourself.
horoscopo.wuXingControlledBy: {animal}, your animal's element, controls (克) the period's {period}: you set the rhythm.
horoscopo.wuXingGeneratedBy: {animal}, your animal's element, nourishes (生) the period's {period}: mind how much energy you give away.
horoscopo.lichunYearNote: The eastern year runs from Lichun to Lichun (立春, ~Feb 4), not from January to January.
horoscopo.lateZiNote: Births between 23:00 and 24:00 (late 子時) may fall on the next day's pillar in some schools; this reading uses the calendar day.
horoscopo.taiSuiZhi: 值太歲 — your year to lead
horoscopo.proHarmoniesHint: Animals in 六合 with you: alliances that flow on their own.
horoscopo.proMonthChangeHint: The 節 marks the monthly energy shift within the period.
horoscopo.proMethodEastern: Period pillars sampled at local noon. Time zone: {tz}.
horoscopo.interpHint: Tap an energy bar or any symbol to read what it means.

billing.title: Your plan
billing.freeBody: Full Numerology and Birth Chart, free forever.
billing.pastDueNote: Your last payment failed. Update your payment method to keep Plus.
billing.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

reports.title: Evolutionary reports
reports.none: You haven't generated this report yet.
reports.generating: Generating your report… tap Refresh in a moment.
reports.dormantBody: Evolutionary reports light up once Aluna's AI voice is connected.
reports.plusTitle: Evolutionary reports are part of Aluna Plus
reports.plusBody: Go Plus to unlock your birth chart and solar return in depth.
reports.noProfileBody: You need a profile with a birth date and place to generate your reports.

tarot.title: Tarot
tarot.dailyFlipCta: Tap to reveal your card of the day
tarot.diaryEmpty: You haven't saved any readings yet.
tarot.freeLimitNote: Showing {count} of {total} saved readings · go Plus to see them all
tarot.questionTitle: What do you ask the deck?
tarot.shuffleHint: Hold, breathe, and release when it feels right
tarot.cutHint: Tap a pile to bring it back together
tarot.fanHint: Tap the ones that call you
tarot.revealHint: Tap each card to turn it over
tarot.ceremonyFreeLimit: Your free journal is full. With Plus, every reading finds its place.
tarot.manualEntryDesc: You shuffled yourself — tell us what came up
tarot.manualSelectHint: Search and tap the card that came up for each position, in the order it appeared
tarot.manualJumpersTitle: Did any card jump from the deck?
tarot.manualJumpersHint: Up to 3 cards that jumped out while shuffling (optional)
tarot.chatDormantBody: The chat with Aluna lights up when you connect her AI voice. Meanwhile, your reading already speaks for itself.
tarot.interpHint: Tap the card of the day or a journal reading to read it here.

share.title: Share this reading
share.privacyNote: The image never includes your birth date, time or place.
share.shareError: We couldn't generate the image. Please try again.

errors.notFoundTitle: This constellation isn't on the map
errors.notFoundBody: That page got lost among the stars. Let's head back to familiar ground.
